title: We use cookies
description: We use essential cookies to make AskBiz work, and optional analytics cookies to improve your experience. See our
essential_desc: Required for login, security, and core features. Cannot be disabled.
analytics_desc: Help us understand how you use AskBiz so we can improve it. No personal data shared with third parties.
marketing_desc: Used to show relevant content about AskBiz features. Disabled by default.
